member.name: T:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorage
member.summary: A class that represents an in-memory job storage that stores all data related to background processing in a process' memory.

member.name: M:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorage.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default options.

member.name: M:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorage.#ctor(Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with specified options.
member.param: The options for the in-memory storage. Cannot be null.
member.exception: Thrown when the argument is null.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorage.Options
member.summary: Gets the options for the in-memory storage.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorage.LinearizableReads
member.summary: Override of property. Always returns true for .

member.name: T:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageIdType
member.summary: Represents the type using for storing background job identifiers.

member.name: F:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageIdType.Long
member.summary: Background job identifiers will be integer-based as in Hangfire.SqlServer storage.

member.name: F:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageIdType.Guid
member.summary: Background job identifiers will be Guid-based like in Hangfire.Pro.Redis storage.

member.name: T:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions
member.summary: Provides configuration options for in-memory storage in Hangfire.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions.IdType
member.summary: Gets or sets the underlying key type for background jobs that can be useful to simulate different persistent storages.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions.MaxExpirationTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum expiration time for all the entries. When set, this value overrides any expiration time set in the other places of Hangfire. The main rationale for this is to control the amount of consumed RAM, since we are more limited in this case, especially when comparing to disk-based storages.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions.MaxStateHistoryLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum length of state history for each background job. Older records are trimmed to avoid uncontrollable growth when some background job is constantly moved from one state to another without being completed.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions.StringComparer
member.summary: Gets or sets comparison rules for keys and indexes inside the storage. You can use this option to match semantics of different storages, for example, use the value to match Redis' case-sensitive rules, or use the option to match SQL Server's default case-insensitive rules.

member.name: P:Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time to wait for a command completion.

member.name: T:Hangfire.GlobalConfigurationExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for global configuration to use .

member.name: M:Hangfire.GlobalConfigurationExtensions.UseInMemoryStorage(Hangfire.IGlobalConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures Hangfire to use the with default options.
member.param: The global configuration on which to set the in-memory storage.
member.returns: An instance of for chaining further configuration.
member.exception: Thrown when the argument is null.

member.name: M:Hangfire.GlobalConfigurationExtensions.UseInMemoryStorage(Hangfire.IGlobalConfiguration,Hangfire.InMemory.InMemoryStorageOptions)
member.summary: Configures Hangfire to use the with the specified options.
member.param: The global configuration on which to set the in-memory storage.
member.returns: An instance of for chaining further configuration.
member.exception: Thrown when the or argument is null.
